category_sources: source_facts.description says it manipulates SGML and XML catalogs; SourceForge project summary says it manipulates XML and SGML catalogs for package systems.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is xmlcatmgr; official SourceForge project and homepage use xmlcatmgr/XML Catalog Manager.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official xmlcatmgr SourceForge-hosted homepage; SourceForge project page is the official project surface and lists summary/files/code.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page includes a Code section for xmlcatmgr; no separate newer official forge was found.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify SGML/XML catalog manipulation; SourceForge project details list C and system-administrator audience.
